name: Jaycee Park
description: Jaycee Park is a place to play pickleball in Antigo, WI. There are 16 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.
open_play_schedule: Currently only open during scheduled open play times.

name: White Lake High School
description: Come play pickleball at White Lake High School in White Lake, WI! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.
